rules.description: Key Vault's soft-delete feature enables recovery of deleted vaults and objects like keys, secrets, and certificates. When enabled, marked resources are retained for 90 days, allowing for their recovery, essentially undoing deletion.
rules.fix: Key Vault's soft-delete feature enables recovery of deleted vaults and objects like keys, secrets, and certificates. When enabled, marked resources are retained for 90 days, allowing for their recovery, essentially undoing deletion.

rules.description: Purge protection secures against malicious deletions by enforcing a retention period for soft deleted key vaults, ensuring no one, not even insiders or Microsoft, can purge your key vaults during this period, preventing permanent data loss.
rules.fix: Review and remediate based on recommendation
